tags.name: Stadel
tags.wheelchair:description: If you have someone to help you down a bit of not steep outdoor stairs, it is a small typical place.

tags.name: Pöstli Stübli
tags.wheelchair:description: It is downstairs, but there is a lift. Some tables are a bit high for a wheelchair user.
